title: Construction, Invariants, Dataclasses, and Slots · Runtime Lens: Oop Constructor Invariants
summary: Build trustworthy catalog, member, and loan objects from validated external records. Planned artifact: Add and verify the oop constructor invariants increment in validated library entity types. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Establish complete valid object invariants during construction or reject invalid input with meaningful errors.
Distinguish object allocation in __new__ from initialization in __init__ and override either only for justified behavior.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
